articles.description: Follow build-up to five Premier League games on Saturday, starting with Liverpool v Chelsea.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE: Build-up, team news, score and live text updates

articles.description: More boos at Anfield highlight why Liverpool must change their style during a seismic summer for Arne Slot.
articles.title: Liverpool still lack identity and Arne Slot needs to fix that

articles.description: Follow live BBC coverage, build-up, team news, scores & live text updates as Ireland host Wales in the penultimate round of the Women's Six Nations 2026.
articles.title: Ireland vs Wales LIVE: Watch Women's Six Nations 2026 - Build-up, team news, scores & live text updates

articles.description: Manchester United are held by Sunderland on a day when they had not had a shot on target until Matheus Cunha's injury time effort was saved by Robin Roefs.
articles.title: Sunderland 0-0 Manchester United: Senne Lammens denies hosts rare win over Man Utd

articles.description: Chelsea were facing the prospect of becoming the first team in English football history to lose seven consecutive league matches heading into an FA Cup final when they fell 1-0 behind at Anfield, but they found a way out.
articles.title: Liverpool 1-1 Chelsea: Blues end losing run with battling display and FA Cup final blueprint

articles.description: Barcelona host Real Madrid in the second Clasico of the season, bidding to clinch a second consecutive La Liga title. They face a team in crisis, in a rivalry where there is no mercy.
articles.title: El Clasico: How can crisis-hit Real Madrid stop Barcelona clinching La Liga title?

articles.description: France run in 11 tries to sweep Scotland aside and earn the bonus-point win that sets up a final day showdown with England next weekend.
articles.title: Women's Six Nations: 11-try France beat Scotland to set up England decider

articles.description: England veteran flanker Marlie Packer scores four tries to help the Red Roses thrash Italy in Parma and remain on course for an eighth straight Women's Six Nations title.
articles.title: Women's Six Nations 2026: Italy 33-61 England - Red Roses close in on Grand Slam

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka suffers a second defeat in three matches as she is beaten by Sorana Cirstea in the Italian Open third round.
articles.title: Italian Open: Aryna Sabalenka loses to Sorana Cirstea in third round, Jasmine Paolini out

articles.description: Bournemouth boost their hopes of securing European football for next season with victory at Fulham in a game in which both sides are reduced to 10 men.
articles.title: Fulham vs AFC Bournemouth: Premier League preview, team news, stats & head-to-head
